title: How to VLOOKUP to the left (return a value from a column before the match)
task: Look up a value and return something from a column to the LEFT of it — which plain VLOOKUP can't do.
explanation: MATCH finds the position of the lookup value in the key column; INDEX returns the value at that same position from any other column — including one to the left. MATCH("Bob",B2:B4,0) is 2, so INDEX(A2:A4, 2) returns X2. XLOOKUP does the same natively.
